title: helianthus annuus var. niveus
intro: Helianthus annuus var. niveus, also known as white sunflower, is a subspecies of the common sunflower that is characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and hairy stems. The medicinal properties of Helianthus annuus var. niveus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Helianthus annuus var. niveus include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
